detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Classic._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Classic.sol#465-527):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Classic.sol#509)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Classic.sol#541-553)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Classic.sol#515)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (Classic.sol#591)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Classic.sol#525)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Classic.sol#685)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Classic.sol#665)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Classic.sol#667)
	Classic._rOwned (Classic.sol#267) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Classic._takeTeam(uint256) (Classic.sol#679-687)
	- Classic._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Classic.sol#661-675)
	- Classic.balanceOf(address) (Classic.sol#383-387)
	- Classic.constructor() (Classic.sol#333-347)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Classic.sol#525)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Classic.sol#693)
	Classic._rTotal (Classic.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Classic._getCurrentSupply() (Classic.sol#785-795)
	- Classic._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Classic.sol#691-697)
	- Classic.constructor() (Classic.sol#333-347)
	- Classic.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Classic.sol#439-447)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Classic.openTrading() (Classic.sol#597-615):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Classic.sol#601)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Classic.sol#611)
	Classic.tradingOpen (Classic.sol#307) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Classic.openTrading() (Classic.sol#597-615)

detectors.description: Classic.openTrading() (Classic.sol#597-615) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Classic.sol#601)

	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage

	- ^0.8.4 (Classic.sol#49)
